text: Just watched Oppenheimer at the IMAX theater in Manhattan. Christopher Nolan really outdid himself with this one. Cillian Murphy deserves every award.
The Lakers are playing the Celtics at Staples Center tonight. LeBron James vs Jayson Tatum is going to be epic!
Reading about how SpaceX successfully launched another Falcon 9 rocket from Cape Canaveral. Elon Musk really is changing the space industry.
Can't believe Taylor Swift broke the record at the Grammys last night. She now has more Album of the Year wins than any other artist in history.
The United Nations General Assembly in New York heard powerful speeches from both the Prime Minister of Japan and the President of Brazil today.
Visiting the Louvre Museum in Paris this weekend. Seeing the Mona Lisa in person was surreal. Leonardo da Vinci was truly a genius.
Google just announced a partnership with Samsung to bring Gemini AI features to the Galaxy S24 series. The tech industry is moving so fast.
Happy birthday to Marie Curie, born on this day in Warsaw, Poland. The first woman to win a Nobel Prize and the only person to win in two different sciences.
The Champions League final between Real Madrid and Manchester City at Wembley Stadium was absolutely incredible. What a match!
Just finished reading Sapiens by Yuval Noah Harari. Anyone who enjoyed that should also check out Guns, Germs, and Steel by Jared Diamond.
